title: Divisions within Iran's leadership prevented negotiating team from traveling — internal rift deepens
snippet: CNN reports: Divisions between allies of President Pezeshkian and figures close to Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei's office derailed the Iran negotiating team's trip at the last minute. Trump blamed 'infighting' among Iran's leadership for the failure to reach a deal. Ghalibaf's resignation confirmed as symptom of deeper structural rift.
tag_reason: 4/24 갈리바프 사임(src-457) 후속. CNN이 내부 분열의 구조적 원인(페제시키안 vs 하메네이 진영)을 구체화.
